channel.title: Vishal R
channel.description: Tech Blogs and DevLogs from Vishal R

item.title: Start Ember: How a Drawing Goal Turned Into an App
item.description: This year, I decided to split my resolutions into quarters, one single goal per quarter. For the first quarter, I chose something I'd always wanted to try: learning to draw characters. The plan was simple. Ten minutes every day. That's it. The first few days went well. Then, as these things go, it ...

item.title: Init on ME NOW PLAN
item.description: Have you ever tried to be productive? Have you ever tried to set up a calendar to schedule your tasks, activities, habits, or even the time you’re going to take a bath? It works fine for a day, or even a week, but there comes a point where you mess up one activity, and like a cute little domino, yo...

item.title: Open Source India 2025
item.description:
Konnichiwa Readers!
Last month, I attended an event I found through my regular magazine, **Open Source For You**. If you like holding a physical magazine that talks about tech, especially the soft side of tech changes, I recommend this one. _Also because I don’t think we have another option in...

item.title: Proof That Even I Can Stick to a Routine
item.description:
Recently I have updated my morning routine to something that I'm proud of, so here I'm to boost it.
1. First thing (after all the essentials), I do a leetcode question every day. This takes me roughly around 45 mins. Yes I'm a bit above noob at this space. Why this habit? Recently I realized I'm b...

item.title: Something Fresh
item.description:
Recently, I’ve been working with a friend of mine on building a lifestyle brand that currently focuses on clothing, skincare, and related food habits.
Started working on the skincare POC, where we first understand the user’s skin. For the POC, we fetch a user’s image and share it with an LLM to ...

item.title: Agentic AI Hackathon by google cloud
item.description:
# 🗓️ The Day:
On the day of **26 July 2025, 09:30 AM** started a 30-hour hackathon. My first full-night hackathon I pulled. Around **700 teams** were shortlisted out of supposedly **3000 teams** who submitted their idea. Yes, they made a **Guinness World Record** with the maximum number of hackat...

item.title: Time. Money. Life.
item.description:
What everyone wants in life? What is the ultimate goal?
**Happiness.** ✨
Does money make everyone happy? Then are all the rich people happy? I’m richer than I was in school, but I’m not happier. (TBH, I was happier back then.)
So what do I think gives happiness? Good health — Freedom — Strong Re...
